description: A ground-level photograph depicting an agro-forestry landscape. The foreground shows a vibrant green grassy field, extensively interspersed with small yellow wildflowers. In the mid-ground, a horizontal line of mature trees with distinct, rounded canopies forms a backdrop against a lighter sky, suggesting a managed system where trees are integrated with pasture. This visual example corresponds to the definition of agro-forestry as a land use management system combining agricultural and forestry techniques, often found in Mediterranean regions like the *dehesa* or *montado* systems.
